validator_assessment.weakest_link: The assumption that premarket gap-up (+$3.30) sustains into RTH without confirmation — last 3 premarket bars show classic exhaustion (61c green body → 3c doji → 15c red), meaning the open must confirm before the bullish case is valid.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: XLK reverses and underperforms SPY (falls below 0% change or loses 0.5%+ from session high) by 10:30 ET — narrows breadth to zero and proves overnight tech concentration was fragile, not foundational.

primary.condition: if SPY holds above 652.80 at open and breaks above PMH 655.55 with above-average volume

secondary.condition: if SPY fails at 655.55 on first test and reverses below 654.00 within first 30 minutes of RTH

invalidation.condition: XLK reverses below session high by 0.5%+ by 10:30 ET (narrow breadth collapses) OR VIX spikes above 26.00 in first 2 hours
invalidation.effect: Bullish consensus invalidated — overnight gap was tech concentration risk, not broad conviction. All 4 agents simultaneously wrong. Bearish target 651.54 / 650.34 PML.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests PMH 655.55 within the first 60 minutes of RTH (by 10:30 ET), with the test outcome (break or rejection) determining the dominant intraday trend direction
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not reach 655.00 by 10:30 ET — fails to approach the PMH zone entirely, suggesting gap fade and range contraction rather than directional follow-through

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains below 26.00 through the first 2 hours of RTH (through 11:30 ET), sustaining the macro risk-on narrative and supporting bullish premium dynamics for 0DTE calls
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX rises above 26.00 by 11:30 ET — macro agent's falling-VIX confidence narrative instantly flips, making directional call premium prohibitively expensive relative to reward

swarm_predictions.claim: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (216c spread) holds through the first 30 minutes of RTH — no 5-minute bar closes below the 20-EMA pivot at 652.80 before 10:00 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Any 5-minute bar closes below 652.50 before 10:00 ET, signaling ribbon compression and loss of the premarket bullish structure — gap-fill risk toward PML 650.34 activated

synthesis_narrative: A unanimous 4/4 bullish vote rests on a CLEAN_BULL ribbon (216c spread), a strong overnight gap (+$3.30 from $650.24 close), clean macro calendar (zero events on 4/1), and risk-on sector rotation (XLK +2.9%). The critical tension is that the premarket itself shows fading momentum in the final 3 bars (61c green → 3c doji → 15c red), meaning the overnight euphoria is already losing velocity before RTH begins, and the entire bullish case gates on a single level: PMH 655.55. Watch the first RTH test of 655.55 — a clean break with volume opens the 660.89 Carry target; a reversal below 654.00 puts all four agents simultaneously on the wrong side of a classic gap-then-reverse bear trap.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon 216c spread, price 74c above 20-EMA pivot; last 3 bars show consolidation/fade after strong gap-up

macro.one_line: VIX 25.06 HIGH regime but falling (-1.49%), clean calendar, risk-on overnight context; caution warranted given still-elevated IV

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level PMH 655.55 is the gating test; primary target 660.89 Carry on break, secondary bearish target 651.54 on rejection

internals.one_line: XLK +2.9% / XLF +0.92% risk-on rotation, XLE -1.26% confirming growth-over-defensive; breadth narrow (tech-concentrated)

validator.top_invalidation: XLK reverses below session high by 0.5%+ by 10:30 ET — narrow breadth collapses and proves gap-up was concentration risk, not broad conviction
